title: Iran Tensions Rise: Strait of Hormuz Crisis Explained #news #shorts
description: Global tensions are rising as Iran asserts control over the Strait of Hormuz, impacting oil, diplomacy, and world stability. Here’s what it means. #Iran #Geopolitics #Shorts

scenes.narration: One narrow waterway is putting the entire world on edge.
scenes.image_prompt: Strait of Hormuz map glowing with global trade routes, cinematic, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: The Strait of Hormuz carries nearly a fifth of the world’s oil supply.
scenes.image_prompt: oil tankers moving through narrow sea channel, dramatic lighting, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Now, Iran is signaling it could control or restrict access to this critical route.
scenes.image_prompt: military ships patrolling narrow strait with tension in air, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: In response, global powers are increasing naval presence in the region.
scenes.image_prompt: multiple navy fleets facing off in open sea, high tension, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: At the same time, nuclear negotiations with Iran remain uncertain.
scenes.image_prompt: diplomats in intense meeting room, flags of multiple countries, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Sanctions, pressure, and diplomacy are colliding all at once.
scenes.image_prompt: split scene of protests, economic charts falling, and political talks, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: The impact is already hitting global markets with rising oil prices.
scenes.image_prompt: oil price graph rising sharply with global map overlay, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: For many countries, this is not just politics—it’s economic survival.
scenes.image_prompt: people at fuel stations, long queues, real world impact, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: What happens next could reshape global power dynamics.
scenes.image_prompt: world map shifting alliances, glowing regions, cinematic, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Because when this strait is threatened—the whole world feels it.
scenes.image_prompt: dark ocean with narrow glowing strait, dramatic ending, vertical 1080x1920
